October 11, 2023 postaiaccessibilitydisabledcommunity AI and Accessibility, Transforming Digital Access for People with Disabilities Artificial intelligence has emerged as a powerful force in accessibility technology offering unprecedented opportunities to bridge gaps that have long excluded disabled people from full digital participation. Yet this transformation comes with complexities that deserve careful examination.
